_meta.audit: No shame lexicon and no verdict language. No medical or withdrawal advice. Physical, time-boxed, urge-surfing framing. Steps map to PanicStep enum: breath, timer, reasons, redirect. Every step is skippable. The `reasons` step renders the user's own motivations verbatim ({{motivations}}) — our copy frames, theirs stars (brand kit §1.2). Discreet mode overrides: the intent is titled 'Reset' and strings carry zero habit context.

entryTitle: Let's take this one wave at a time.

steps.title: Breathe with me
steps.instruction: Follow the circle. In for 4, hold for 7, out for 8. Three rounds.
steps.hapticOnlyLabel: Feel the taps — in, hold, out.
steps.instructionNonVisual: Breathe with the taps. In for 4, hold for 7, out for 8. Three rounds.

steps.title: This will pass
steps.instruction: Urges crest and pass — usually within about 15 minutes. You don't have to win forever right now. Just this wave.
steps.subtext: Stay here as long as you like. Nothing is counting down against you.

steps.title: Why you started
steps.emptyFallback: You chose this for your own reasons. They still count right now.

steps.title: What now?
steps.instruction: Pick something small for the next few minutes.

exits.label: The urge passed
exits.confirmation: That one passed. That's the whole skill — surfing the wave instead of fighting it.

exits.label: I slipped
exits.note: Routes to the slip flow. No shame copy anywhere on this path.
